narrative:
Precinct Killbuck Township (precinct in Holmes County) has 1,163 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.8 percentage points.
